event: Founded 'MoonPixel' and began taking on freelance web development projects.
Joined Alephoo as a Full Stack Developer, starting his professional career in a corporate environment.
Began his Systems Engineering degree at Universidad Tecnolµgica Nacional (UTN).
Started developing with Go for high-performance services at Alephoo.
Began development of the interactive 3D portfolio with Three.js.
Architected and began development of the multi-tenant Veterinary SaaS platform.
Developed and launched the AI-powered assistant for his personal portfolio.
